WsEmbyCover.name: WsEmbyCover
WsEmbyCover.description: Generate dynamic or static library covers for Emby/Jellyfin
WsEmbyCover.author: wushuangshangjiang

history.v1.1: Clean history and fix title template/log chain
history.v1.2: Fix garbled logs, style2 six-poster layout, and profile parameter application
history.v1.3: Fix active server profile update to preserve advanced parameters in More Settings
history.v1.4: When Save + Update Now is enabled, persist latest settings first, then run update with new settings
history.v1.7: Improve sort-rule consistency for Update Now, add clear cache/title diagnostics logs, and optimize title matching robustness
history.v1.8: Fix clean-cache button invocation by switching UI request to POST to ensure backend API is hit
history.v1.9: Add a page-level clean-cache action button to reliably trigger backend cache cleanup API
history.v1.10: Remove get_page and cache-clean button, optimize base-setting layout, and set cover history retention default to 3
history.v1.11: Remove WsEmbyCover custom get_page implementation so plugin opens directly in config flow
history.v1.12: Fix regression by restoring get_page override to keep plugin config form rendering normally
history.v1.13: Remove extra details-page content by keeping get_page empty return across plugin variants
history.v1.14: Hotfix: keep explicit get_page implementation to satisfy abstract base contract and avoid plugin load failure
history.v1.15: Replace empty detail placeholder with action-entry page for quick cover update operations
history.v1.16: Restore legacy get_page behavior and migrate repository to v2-only by removing v1 plugin code
